query: SELECT c.name, c.sector, scr.sectorCode, scr.expectedAnnualLoss FROM supplyChainRisks scr JOIN companies c ON scr.companyId = c.id WHERE scr.expectedAnnualLoss IS NOT NULL AND scr.expectedAnnualLoss != '' AND scr.expectedAnnualLoss != '0' LIMIT 10
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ovDZf4AdgM1wjio.bac7ad92b374 --database Rur7xAEUjvByHVg3PaP3cz --execute SELECT c.name, c.sector, scr.sectorCode, scr.expectedAnnualLoss FROM supplyChainRisks scr JOIN companies c ON scr.companyId = c.id WHERE scr.expectedAnnualLoss IS NOT NULL AND scr.expectedAnnualLoss != '' AND scr.expectedAnnualLoss != '0' LIMIT 10
